name: Eddie Duran
abstract: Edward Lozano Duran (September 6, 1925 – November 22, 2019) was an American jazz guitarist from San Francisco. He recorded often with Vince Guaraldi and was a member of the Benny Goodman orchestra during the 1970s.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Benny Goodman Salute to Jazz Interactions

works.t: I Got It Bad (and That Ain't Good)

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Lateano
about_quotes.evidence: And got through it somehow, and the rest of the record — oh Eddie Duran’s on that, the guitarist, he’s on there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Lateano interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Francisco, California, August 8, 2002
